entities.name: Diff Tag Accuracy
entities.context: Metric for measuring correctness of baseline comparison tags (Amplifies/Reinforces/etc.), target ≥90%

entities.name: Divergence Detection Recall
entities.context: Metric for measuring identification of conflicts and contradictions, target ≥85%

entities.name: Cohesion Index
entities.context: Metric measuring overall strategic alignment, target ≥0.6 for healthy state

relationships.context: Both are accuracy metrics in the same measurement framework
Divergence detection feeds into overall cohesion measurement
Tag accuracy contributes to strategic alignment measurement
